'''âw-r-l''' ('''warala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:poleaxe|poleaxe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-r-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poleaxe|poleaxe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-r-l
|-
! Lemma
| warala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:waralithi|waralithi]] || [[word:waraliji|waraliji]] || [[word:waralishi|waralishi]] || [[word:warali|warali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:waraluthuth|waraluthuth]] || [[word:waralujuj|waralujuj]] || [[word:waralushush|waralushush]] || [[word:waral|waral]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:waraluthu|waraluthu]] || [[word:waraluju|waraluju]] || [[word:waralushu|waralushu]] || [[word:waralu|waralu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:waralufuth|waralufuth]] || [[word:waralufuj|waralufuj]] || [[word:waralufush|waralufush]] || [[word:waraluf|waraluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:waralethe|waralethe]] || [[word:waraleje|waraleje]] || [[word:waraleshe|waraleshe]] || [[word:warale|warale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:waralothoth|waralothoth]] || [[word:waralojoj|waralojoj]] || [[word:waraloshosh|waraloshosh]] || [[word:waral|waral]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:waralotho|waralotho]] || [[word:waralojo|waralojo]] || [[word:waralosho|waralosho]] || [[word:waralo|waralo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:waralofoth|waralofoth]] || [[word:waralofoj|waralofoj]] || [[word:waralofosh|waralofosh]] || [[word:waralof|waralof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:waralĂŠthĂŠ|waralĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:waralĂŠjĂŠ|waralĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:waralĂŠshĂŠ|waralĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:waralĂŠ|waralĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:waralathath|waralathath]] || [[word:waralajaj|waralajaj]] || [[word:waralashash|waralashash]] || [[word:waral|waral]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:waralatha|waralatha]] || [[word:waralaja|waralaja]] || [[word:waralasha|waralasha]] || [[word:warala|warala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:waralafath|waralafath]] || [[word:waralafaj|waralafaj]] || [[word:waralafash|waralafash]] || [[word:waralaf|waralaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:waralasha|waralasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowaralasha|gowaralasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwaralasha|gokiwaralasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:waralnĂŒsha|waralnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowaralnknĂŒsha|gowaralnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwaralnĂŒsha|gokiwaralnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:waralshĂ«sha|waralshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowaralnkshĂ«sha|gowaralnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwaralshĂ«sha|gokiwaralshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:waralrosha|waralrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowaralnkrosha|gowaralnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwaralrosha|gokiwaralrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:waralmusha|waralmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowaralnkmusha|gowaralnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwaralmusha|gokiwaralmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:waralsherasha|waralsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowaralnksherasha|gowaralnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwaralsherasha|gokiwaralsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:waralngasha|waralngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowaralnkngasha|gowaralnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwaralngasha|gokiwaralngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:waralyasha|waralyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowaralnkyasha|gowaralnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwaralyasha|gokiwaralyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:waralyamasha|waralyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowaralnkyamasha|gowaralnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwaralyamasha|gokiwaralyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:waralnĂŒshĂ«sha|waralnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowaralnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gowaralnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwaralnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiwaralnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:waralnĂŒrosha|waralnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowaralnknĂŒrosha|gowaralnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwaralnĂŒrosha|gokiwaralnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:waralnĂŒmusha|waralnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowaralnknĂŒmusha|gowaralnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwaralnĂŒmusha|gokiwaralnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:waralshĂ«nĂŒsha|waralshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowaralnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gowaralnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwaralshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiwaralshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:waralshĂ«rosha|waralshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowaralnkshĂ«rosha|gowaralnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwaralshĂ«rosha|gokiwaralshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:waralshĂ«musha|waralshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowaralnkshĂ«musha|gowaralnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwaralshĂ«musha|gokiwaralshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:waralronĂŒsha|waralronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowaralnkronĂŒsha|gowaralnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwaralronĂŒsha|gokiwaralronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:waralroshĂ«sha|waralroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowaralnkroshĂ«sha|gowaralnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwaralroshĂ«sha|gokiwaralroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:waralromusha|waralromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowaralnkromusha|gowaralnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwaralromusha|gokiwaralromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:waralmunĂŒsha|waralmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowaralnkmunĂŒsha|gowaralnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwaralmunĂŒsha|gokiwaralmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:waralmushĂ«sha|waralmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowaralnkmushĂ«sha|gowaralnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwaralmushĂ«sha|gokiwaralmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:waralmurosha|waralmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowaralnkmurosha|gowaralnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwaralmurosha|gokiwaralmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:waral|waral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:wĂŠrĂŠl|wĂŠrĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howaral|howaral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:howĂŠrĂŠl|howĂŠrĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowaral|hohowaral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowĂŠrĂŠl|hohowĂŠrĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒwaral|nĂŒwaral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒwĂŠrĂŠl|nĂŒwĂŠrĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwaral|nĂŒnĂŒwaral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠrĂŠl|nĂŒnĂŒwĂŠrĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻwaral|nĂŻwaral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻwĂŠrĂŠl|nĂŻwĂŠrĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwaral|nĂŻnĂŻwaral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠrĂŠl|nĂŻnĂŻwĂŠrĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwaral|luwaral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luwĂŠrĂŠl|luwĂŠrĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwaral|luluwaral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwĂŠrĂŠl|luluwĂŠrĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwaral|liwaral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liwĂŠrĂŠl|liwĂŠrĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwaral|liliwaral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwĂŠrĂŠl|liliwĂŠrĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowaral|kowaral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kowĂŠrĂŠl|kowĂŠrĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowaral|kokowaral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowĂŠrĂŠl|kokowĂŠrĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewaral|kewaral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kewĂŠrĂŠl|kewĂŠrĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewaral|kekewaral]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewĂŠrĂŠl|kekewĂŠrĂŠl]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
